"I found a mix of likely-real hands-on channels and some obvious generic roundup channels. I’m going to favor hands-on sources like The Hook Up, Vacuum Wars, Vacuum Nerds, Just Josh, and Just A Dad, then use one generic roundup only as a cross-check rather than letting it drive the picks."

    "transcriptLength": 14773,
    "transcriptStart": "In December 2025, iRobot filed for bankruptcy. The company that invented the robot vacuum category, the brand [music] that made Roomba a household name, collapsed after 35 years in business. The company blamed tariffs and failed acquisitions, but the real story is simpler. Chinese [music] competitors built better robots for less money, and the pioneer couldn't keep up. Now, Roomba's new owner is Pekee Robotics, a Chinese [music] manufacturer. Users are worried about their devices getting bricked if software support disappears. [music] And everyone is wondering, what happened to the company that used to define this category? This story matters [music] because it tells you everything about the robot vacuum market in 2026. The brands your parents trusted are struggling. The brands dominating quality tests are names many Americans have never heard of. And the gap between a good robot vacuum and a bad one has never been wider. Today, we are ranking every major robot vacuum brand [music] fro"
  }
]"

"The most useful video evidence so far points to Roborock Qrevo Curv/Curv 2 Flow, Dreame X60, Roborock Saros 20, Narwal Flow/Flow 2, MOVA V50, Ecovacs X12, and eufy’s newer value models. I’m checking official and retailer pages now so I don’t recommend anything that only exists in affiliate descriptions."

This model also did an incredible job in our hair management tests. The X12 has an anti-tangle main brush with bristles which do an excellent job of agitating floor surfaces. In our pet hair pickup test, where we flatten 2 and 1/2 in hairs on carpets to see how much the robot is able to vacuum, the X12 removed 100% of the hairs. This is a rare score that we also saw in the T90, which tells us that Ecovacs is doing something right with their brush system.
